cases.prompt: Turn these raw notes into a persistent LLM wiki entry with useful links and structure.
cases.expected_behavior: Creates a reusable wiki-style knowledge artifact.

cases.prompt: Build a compounding wiki page from the source material and keep it organized for future reuse.
cases.expected_behavior: Synthesizes a durable knowledge base entry.

cases.prompt: Summarize this one-off article for me.
cases.expected_behavior: This is a summary request, not a persistent wiki build.

cases.prompt: I have multiple raw sources about the same topic; merge them into one wiki page without losing key references.
cases.expected_behavior: Integrates multiple sources into a structured wiki entry.
